title.en: How to Become Better and Stronger
title.zh: 如何让自己变得越来越厉害

summary.en: In my view, these are seven core principles that help a person keep growing, becoming rational, independent, and steadily stronger.
summary.zh: 在我看来让人持续变强、清醒独立、稳步向上的七条核心原则。

content.en:
1. Do not be confined by grand narratives; keep your own agency.

2. Believe that everything that happens can benefit me, and everything can be used by me.

3. Respect statistical patterns, while at the same time firmly believing I am unique.

4. Keep moving forward in environments with no feedback and even negative feedback, and calmly accept life's uncertainty.

5. Consciously control my input.

6. Become anyone you need to be, and bear all due costs willingly.

7. Be able to understand the negation of negation, so I can keep renewing, revising, and growing.

These are, in my view, indispensable things for a person to gradually become stronger. I will elaborate on each point when I have time.
content.zh:
1. 不被宏大叙事束缚，守住自我主体性。

2. 相信凡是发生皆有利于我，万物皆可为我所用。

3. 尊重统计规律，同时又坚信自己与众不同。

4. 能够在无反馈乃至负反馈的环境里前行，坦然接受人生的不确定性。

5. 有意识控制自己的输入。

6. 可以成为任何人，并且愿意承担所有应当承担的代价。

7. 能理解否定之否定，可以持续自我更新、修正与成长。

以上就是在我看来一个人慢慢变厉害必不可少的东西，后面有空会逐条详细说说。

items: All's fair in love and war.
Some of us get dipped in flat, some in satin, some in gloss. But every once in a while you find someone who's iridescent, and when you do, nothing will ever compare. -- Flipped
The real death is that no one in the world remembers you. -- Coco
If you shed tears when you miss the sun, you also miss the stars. -- Stray Birds
山有木兮木有枝，心悦君兮君不知。——《越人歌》
I exist because you need me. —— Claire McFall, Ferryman
Good morning, and in case I don't see you, good afternoon, good evening, and good night! —— The Truman Show
Whatever happens tomorrow, we had today. —— One Day
I want love or death. —— Léon: The Professional
生命是有光的，在我熄灭以前，能够照亮你一点，就是我所有能做的了。我爱你，你要记得我。——《云边有个小卖部》
相信奇迹的人，本身就和奇迹一样了不起！——《星游记》

items: 《生于忧患，死于安乐》 -- 孟子
